item.title: Contact us
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Contact us

Contact us via the contact form below, or come visit us on our office in Melbourne and we will discuss your new project

Contact Info

Have a project or an idea you'd like to collaborate with Us? Let's get in touch!
  • Phone: +68 6886 6888
  • Support@plazathemes.com
  • London Eye, London, United Kingdom

Contact Form

* All fields marked with a asterisk are required [wpforms id="2611" title="false" description="false"]

item.title: About us
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
About us

Great theme, excellent support. We had a few small issues with getting the dropdown menus to work and support fixed them and let us know which files were changed so that we could replicate from dev to production.

Who We Are ?

After every trip to Hawaii, I always have a few DMs asking where we stayed, our favorite beaches, etc. Especially with spring break around the corner, I wanted to share a recap of our trip a couple weeks ago. (I’ve shared a few recaps of where we’ve stayed and our favorite activities when we went as a family – this trip was more of an adult trip but I have multiple posts with guides on past Hawaii trips: a Maui Travel Guide, Oahu Family edition, and more of our Oahu faves here.) 

Since I’ve shared a lot of our favorites in the past posts, I’m just going to highlight my favorites from this trip like what to eat, where to stay, and where to play (like beaches, hikes, etc.

About Us

From Leonard’s I always get the Cream Malasadas. Ted’s has a bunch of different pies but I think the one I had was Chocolate Haupia (coconut) Pie – their signature!

Our Mission

They have a kitchen, so you can cook some of your meals if you want to, it’s nice for breakfast especially. The views are gorgeous, I love seeing the ocean, mountains and beach all right there.

Our Values

This cove reminded me so much of the beaches in Europe! It’s right down from Hanama Bay. The water was crazy clear and sooo pretty! We saw turtles and whales

0 Satisfied Clients 0 Projects a Year 0 Awards Won 0 Support Tickets

Meet Our Team

Marcosinacioluz

Designer

Wingcitymedia

Photographer

Tee3sports

Designer

Aussiemines

C.E.O

item.title: Store Locator
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
1. Sydney Flagship, Westfield

Side Bar, 509 Pitt St, Sydney NSW 2000, Australia

Tel: +68.17.00.552.369

2. Vasia Melbourne

Shop 1/169 Collins St, Melbourne VIC 3000, Australia

Tel: +68.17.00.552.369

3. Perth, King Street

48-56 King Street Perth, Western Australia, 1000, Australia

Tel: +68.17.00.552.369

Side Bar, 509 Pitt St, Sydney NSW 2000, Australia\r<\/p>\r

Tel: +68.17.00.552.369<\/p>","_element_id":"adress1-locator","_css_classes":"adress-locator active"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"html"},{"id":"d2e1c01","elType":"widget","settings":{"html":"

2. Vasia Melbourne<\/h6>\r

Shop 1\/169 Collins St, Melbourne VIC 3000, Australia\r<\/p>\r

Tel: +68.17.00.552.369<\/p>","_element_id":"adress2-locator","_css_classes":"adress-locator"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"html"},{"id":"6d7d6de","elType":"widget","settings":{"html":"

3. Perth, King Street<\/h6>\r

48-56 King Street\rPerth, Western Australia, 1000, Australia\r<\/p>\r

Tel: +68.17.00.552.369<\/p>","_element_id":"adress3-locator","_css_classes":"adress-locator"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"html"}],"isInner":false},{"id":"4e2ef6c","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":66,"_inline_size":null},"elements":[{"id":"08894b8","elType":"widget","settings":{"address":"Side Bar, 509 Pitt St, Sydney NSW 2000, Australia","_element_id":"map1-locator","_css_classes":"map-locator active","height":{"unit":"px","size":740,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"google_maps"},{"id":"314e62f","elType":"widget","settings":{"address":"Shop 1\/169 Collins St, Melbourne VIC 3000, Australia","_element_id":"map2-locator","_css_classes":"map-locator","height":{"unit":"px","size":740,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"google_maps"},{"id":"76719ac","elType":"widget","settings":{"address":"44 King St, Perth WA 6000, Australia","_element_id":"map3-locator","_css_classes":"map-locator","height":{"unit":"px","size":740,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"google_maps"}],"isInner":false}],"isInner":false}]

item.title: Home 11

item.content:encoded:
Start From $99Sesame Printed Medium Backpackshop nowLaptop BackpacksBlack Friday Sale 50% Offshop now

  • Women's
